body.title: Aider as a rack coding device (cheap build worker)
body.description:
Add Aider (open-source CLI coding agent, supports any LLM provider) as a rack device. Granny routes build/code tasks to it instead of spawning a full Claude CC worker. Aider can run against Qwen/Llama/any cheap model via Ollama or OpenRouter, dramatically reducing cost for minion-class work. Announce as a device, register with Granny as worker type 'aider'.

**Affected files:** devices/aider/ (new), devices/granny/daemon.py, devices/granny/device.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: Aider device lifecycle, Granny routing to aider worker type, config for which model it uses. Out of scope: model evaluation (T-model-eval-harness), provider abstraction (T-inference-proxy-mini-rack).
**Completion criteria:** Granny can dispatch a ticket to Aider. Aider completes a real coding task using a cheap model (Qwen or Llama via Ollama). CC worker not spawned.
